author: Will Deacon <will@kernel.org>
description: IOMMU API for ARM architected SMMU implementations
name: arm_smmu
parm: disable_bypass:Disable bypass streams such that incoming transactions from devices that are not attached to an iommu domain will report an abort back to the device and will not be allowed to pass through the SMMU.

force_stage:Force SMMU mappings to be installed at a particular stage of translation. A value of '1' or '2' forces the corresponding stage. All other values are ignored (i.e. no stage is forced). Note that selecting a specific stage will disable support for nested translation.
